criteria.name: Personalized Learning Paths
criteria.description: The app's ability to create customized study plans that cater to each learner's unique needs by assessing individual strengths and weaknesses based on performance data using AI algorithms.

criteria.name: AI-Powered Tutoring
criteria.description: Availability of AI to offer tutoring and writing assistance in various subjects.

criteria.name: Automated Assessment and Feedback
criteria.description: The app's capacity to evaluate assignments, provide detailed feedback, streamline the grading process, ensure consistency, and save teachers time using AI.
criteria.sources: ideausher.com, University of San Diego Online Degrees

criteria.name: Adaptive Learning Algorithms
criteria.description: AI algorithms assess a learner's pace, strengths, and gaps, dynamically tailoring lessons and challenges to meet individual needs to increases engagement and retention, especially in self-paced learning.

criteria.name: User Ratings/Reviews
criteria.description: Aggregated user feedback reflecting overall satisfaction and perceived effectiveness of the app based on user experiences.

criteria.name: Accessibility Features
criteria.description: The extent to which the app incorporates features that make it usable by individuals with disabilities, including support for screen readers, alternative text for images, and adjustable font sizes.
